title: Smoky Beef Stew
description: A hearty keto stew with smoky flavors and tender beef.

ingredients.name: beef
ingredients.notes: Choose a keto-friendly cut like ribeye or sirloin

ingredients.name: corned beef
ingredients.notes: Use a small amount to enhance flavor

ingredients.name: smoky
ingredients.amount: 2 tablespoons, smoked paprika or chipotle powder
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for smoky flavor

ingredients.name: goeey
ingredients.notes: For a keto twist, choose a lower-carb cheese

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: Choose a low-carb broth or make your own

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: Use a keto-friendly salt like sea salt or Himalayan pink salt

ingredients.name: pepper
ingredients.notes: Use freshly ground pepper for best flavor

instructions: Heat a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the corned beef and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika or chipotle powder and cook for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1.5 hours.
Stir in the shredded cheddar until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
